title: Earnings call transcript: Root Inc's Q4 2024 earnings beat forecasts, stock surges
text: Root exceeded analyst expectations significantly in Q4 2024. The company reported earnings per share (EPS) of $1.30, vastly outperforming the forecasted loss of $0.52. Revenue reached $326.7 million, surpassing the projected $291.34 million. Net income in Q4 was $22 million, representing a $46 million year-over-year improvement. Gross combined ratio was 95% on $1.3 billion in gross premiums written. For full year 2024, Root posted $31 million GAAP net income and $112 million adjusted EBITDA. Policies in force grew to 414,000, up 21% year-over-year. Root's stock surged 17.11% in after-hours trading following the announcement, closing at $115.60. The company demonstrated significant momentum, with a 326% annual return, though recent volatility included an 18% decline in the preceding week. CEO Alex Timm emphasized the company's long-term perspective: At Root, it's all about the long term. The organization plans selective rate decreases in profitable regions while expanding into new states, now reaching 76% of the U.S. population. Management expects continued growth through partnership channels and disciplined underwriting practices.
